zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Markham I於1406年8月出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾時，他的父親Sir John Markham I38歲，母親Elizabeth de Cressi36歲。他和Lady Elizabeth de Bourdon至少有2個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於1446年10月12日享年40歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾易亞斯特 馬卡姆。

nameMeanings.name: Markham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Markham Clinton or East Markham (Nottinghamshire). The placename derives from Old English mearc ‘mark, boundary’ + hām ‘village, homestead’ or hamm ‘water meadow’.

Irish: English surname used as an equivalent of Gaelic Ó Marcacháin ‘descendant of Marcachán’, a diminutive of Marcach ‘horseman, rider’ (see Markey ). This was originally a Galway surname but is now found mainly in Clare, sometimes translated into English as Ryder .

variants.name: Markey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Donal, Donovan, Fergal.
Irish (Monaghan): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Marcaigh ‘descendant of Marcach’, a name meaning ‘horseman, knight’, from marc ‘horse’. Compare Markham 2.
English: apparently from a placename meaning ‘boundary river’ in Old or Middle English, but no such place has been identified.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Markham I was born in August 1406, in Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Markham I, was 38 and his mother, Elizabeth de Cressi, was 36. He had at least 2 sons and 7 daughters with Lady Elizabeth de Bourdon. He died on 12 October 1446, at the age of 40, and was buried in East Markham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Markham I est né en août 1406, à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Markham I, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Cressi, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles avec Lady Elizabeth de Bourdon. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1446, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à East Markham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Markham Iが1406年8月にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Markham Iは38歳，母Elizabeth de Cressiは36歳であった。彼はLady Elizabeth de Bourdonとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼は1446年10月12日に40歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアエアスト マークハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Markham I(이)가 1406년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Markham I(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Cressi(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Lady Elizabeth de Bourdon(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1446년 10월 12일 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 이스트 마카에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Markham I родился август 1406 г. в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Markham I было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Cressi, 36. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей от Lady Elizabeth de Bourdon. Он умер 12 октября 1446 г. в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности эаст мархам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.
